app.headline: The perfect template to present your awesome product.
app.description: Built with Rust, Tauri, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Query, and Zustand. Featuring the Elevate design system.

features.rustCoreDesc: High-performance backend logic compiled to native code via Tauri.
features.reactFrontendDesc: Modern UI with React Query for data fetching and Zustand for state.
features.tailwindDesc: Utility-first styling with Elevate fonts and theme system.

quote.text: Good design is as little design as possible.
quote.author: Dieter Rams

ollama.notRunningDesc: This app requires Ollama to manage AI models. Install it to get started.
